about.tagline: Local-first notes, tasks, and calendar. Your data stays in your vault.

accent.desc: Used for highlights, selection, focus, and the editor.
accent.label: Accent color

colorTheme.desc: Dark, light, or follow your system.
colorTheme.label: Color theme

density.desc: Compact tightens the editor reading area.
density.label: Density

fontSize.desc: Overall text and UI scale. Applied when you close Settings.
fontSize.label: Font size
fontSize.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

calendar.calendarsDesc: Read-only subscriptions — Google, Outlook, or any ICS URL (incl. secret iCal links).

duration.desc: Length of a newly created event.
duration.label: Default event duration

calendar.urlPlaceholder: ICS URL (e.g. Google/Outlook secret iCal address)

weekStart.desc: First day of the calendar grid.
weekStart.label: Week starts on

autosave.desc: How long after you stop typing the note is saved.
autosave.label: Autosave delay

typing.desc: Lower reacts faster to keystrokes but uses a little more CPU.
typing.label: Typing responsiveness

defaultTaskView.desc: List, board, or agenda when opening Tasks.
defaultTaskView.label: Default task view

inboxPath.desc: Note that receives tasks for the Inbox strategy.
inboxPath.label: Inbox path

recentNotes.desc: How many recently opened notes to keep (this device).
recentNotes.label: Recent notes

startView.desc: Which view opens when you launch Novalis.
startView.label: Start view

strategy.desc: Where new tasks are filed by default.
strategy.label: Strategy

language.hint: Applies to this device. Changes take effect immediately.
language.label: Display language

plugins.empty: No plugins installed. Drop a plugin folder into <2>.novalis/plugins/</2> in your vault (see PLUGINS.md), then reopen Settings.

tasks.columnsDesc: Columns shown in the board view.

templates.desc: Reusable note scaffolds available when creating a note.
